events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Clay Kai asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

diaries.text:
**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 99

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

Sheltered underground for days.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*

**Clay Mar-II** (air/mediator) — Year 99

Another year. We are still here.

Sheltered underground for days.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Clay Mar-II, mediator*

**Dax Iron** (fire/soldier) — Year 99

Another year. We are still here.

Sheltered underground for days.
A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.

*— Dax Iron, soldier*
